responses: Hello, this is FreightBot. How can I help with your shipment today?
Hi, you're speaking with FreightBot. I can help with tracking, quotes, delays, and delivery support.
Hello. Tell me your freight issue and I will guide you through the next step.
Thanks for contacting FreightBot. Goodbye.
Goodbye. Reach out again if you need help with another shipment.
Session closed. Have a good day.
You're welcome.
Happy to help.
No problem. Let me know if you need anything else.
I can help with shipment tracking, delivery delays, quote requests, pickup booking, damaged freight guidance, and business hours.
I support common logistics questions including tracking updates, pricing requests, pickup scheduling, damaged items, and depot information.
For the prototype, please provide a tracking number such as TRK12345.
Please share your tracking or consignment number so I can continue.
I can help with delay support. Please provide your tracking number and delivery suburb.
Sorry about the delay. For the prototype, provide a tracking number and I will guide the next step.
To prepare a quote, please provide pickup suburb, delivery suburb, weight, and pallet or carton count.
For a freight estimate, I need origin, destination, load type, and approximate weight.
To book a pickup, please provide collection address, date, contact name, and freight type.
I can assist with pickup booking. Share the collection location, preferred date, and shipment details.

patterns: How do I report freight damage?
responses: Please take photos of the packaging and goods, keep the items, and provide your tracking number for a damage claim.
For damage support, keep the freight in its received condition and send photos, item details, and the tracking number.

patterns: Can I change the delivery date?
responses: Delivery changes may be possible before the shipment reaches the final depot. Please provide the tracking number and requested change.
I can log a delivery change request. Share your tracking number and the new delivery instruction.
For the prototype, customer support hours are Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM.
Prototype service hours are 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM on weekdays, excluding public holidays.
I can escalate this case. For the prototype, the next step is to collect your name, phone number, and tracking number.
I will hand this to a support agent in the workflow. Please provide your contact details and shipment reference.
I did not understand that. Try asking about tracking, freight quotes, pickup booking, delivery delays, or damaged freight.
Please rephrase your request. I currently support shipment tracking, quotes, pickups, delays, and delivery changes.
